title: notholaena nigricans
intro: Notholaena nigricans, also known as black fern or black rock fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae, native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Notholaena nigricans include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. Notholaena nigricans can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and has also been traditionally used as a poultice or topical application.
